acceptance_targets: [ch10-craft-001] PASS if the revised span between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:119 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:143 contains at least 3 distinct Lena-internal beats (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment), and no run longer than 5 consecutive paragraphs in that span is purely external action/dialogue. FAIL otherwise.

[F012] Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3437 no longer uses a still/flat eye-face formula and instead delivers a distinct shutdown behavior; fail if the revised beat remains a variant of the same facial template.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised span between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:119 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:143 contains at least 3 distinct Lena-internal beats (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment), and no run longer than 5 consecutive paragraphs in that span is purely external action/dialogue. FAIL otherwise.
findings.problem: The tailgate negotiation runs as an external transcript for a long stretch (13 consecutive paragraphs) before re-entering Lena's interior at line 145. The chapter temporarily loses close-third pressure and reads flatter than the surrounding material.
findings.rewrite_direction: Insert focalized interior beats in the same exchange at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:121, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:129, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:137, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:141. Keep them brief (1-2 sentences each) and specific to Lena (body sensation, memory flash, or self-assessment) so the Otis dialogue still drives the scene.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3437 no longer uses a still/flat eye-face formula and instead delivers a distinct shutdown behavior; fail if the revised beat remains a variant of the same facial template.
findings.problem: Recurring full-book prose tic: default facial stillness/flatness appears across 4 chapters (1, 3, 10, 17). This chapter should replace its instance to avoid repetitive character reaction coding.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace the reaction line at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3437 with a non-facial response that shows Otis's shutdown through action, syntax break, or object interaction (for example: latch behavior, stance change, or refusal rhythm).

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
